### REQUEST ###
```
POST https://api2.cursor.sh:443/aiserver.v1.RepositoryService/FastUpdateFileV2 HTTP/1.1
Accept-Encoding: gzip
Authorization: Bearer REDACTED
Connect-Protocol-Version: 1
Connect-Timeout-Ms: 180000
Connection: close
Content-Encoding: gzip
Content-Type: application/proto
Host: api2.cursor.sh
Traceparent: REDACTED
User-Agent: connect-es/1.6.1
X-Amzn-Trace-Id: REDACTED
X-Cursor-Checksum: REDACTED
X-Cursor-Client-Arch: x64
X-Cursor-Client-Device-Type: desktop
X-Cursor-Client-Os: win32
X-Cursor-Client-Type: ide
X-Cursor-Client-Version: 2.6.11
X-Cursor-Config-Version: REDACTED
X-Cursor-Timezone: REDACTED
X-Ghost-Mode: true
X-New-Onboarding-Completed: false
X-Request-Id: REDACTED
X-Session-Id: REDACTED
```

```
{
  "1:LEN": {
    "1:I64": 4842195278606858022
  },
  "2:LEN": "REDACTED",
  "6:VARINT": 4,
  "7:LEN": [
    {
      "2:LEN": {
        "1:LEN": {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": " from __future__ import annotations\r\n \r\n import random\r\n from typing import Callable\r\n \r\n \r\n def compute_backoff_seconds(\r\n     attempt: int,\r\n     *,\r\n     base: float,\r\n     multiplier: float,\r\n     cap: float,\r\n     rng: Callable[[], float] | None = None,\r\n ) -> float:\r\n     \"\"\"Compute exponential backoff with jitter.\r\n \r\n     The formula is:\r\n         delay_no_jitter = min(cap, base * multiplier ** max(attempt - 1, 0))\r\n         jitter = uniform(0, delay_no_jitter)\r\n         delay = jitter\r\n \r\n     Using full jitter keeps retries smoothed over the window.\r\n     \"\"\"\r\n \r\n     if attempt <= 0:\r\n         raise ValueError(\"attempt must be >= 1\")\r\n \r\n     if rng is None:\r\n         rng = random.random\r\n \r\n     delay_no_jitter = min(cap, base * (multiplier ** max(attempt - 1, 0)))\r\n     return delay_no_jitter * rng()\r\n \r\n"
        },
        "2:LEN": "76e8d0c605188530080cf3070eabd0723da5ebe60b6d4ac1daad83941413e6eb",
        "3:LEN": "REDACTED"
      },
      "3:LEN": [
        {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED"
        },
        {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED"
        },
        {
          "1:LEN": "."
        }
      ],
      "4:VARINT": 1
    },
    {
      "2:LEN": {
        "1:LEN": {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED",
          "2:LEN": " from __future__ import annotations\r\n \r\n from dataclasses import dataclass\r\n from typing import Any, Dict, List, Tuple\r\n \r\n import redis.asyncio as redis\r\n \r\n from .config import get_settings\r\n from .logging import get_logger\r\n from .metrics import JOBS_ENQUEUED_TOTAL, QUEUE_DEPTH, WORKER_RECLAIMS_TOTAL\r\n \r\n \r\n logger = get_logger(__name__, service=\"broker\")\r\n \r\n _redis_client: redis.Redis | None = None\r\n \r\n \r\n def get_redis() -> redis.Redis:\r\n     global _redis_client\r\n     if _redis_client is None:\r\n         settings = get_settings()\r\n         _redis_client = redis.from_url(settings.redis_url)\r\n     return _redis_client\r\n \r\n \r\n def stream_for_queue(queue: str) -> str:\r\n     return f\"jobs:{queue}\"\r\n \r\n \r\n DEAD_LETTER_STREAM = \"jobs:dlq\"\r\n \r\n \r\n @dataclass\r\n class BrokerMessage:\r\n     stream: str\r\n     entry_id: str\r\n     fields: Dict[str, Any]\r\n \r\n \r\n async def ensure_group(queue: str) -> None:\r\n     \"\"\"Ensure the Redis Stream and consumer group exist.\"\"\"\r\n \r\n     settings = get_settings()\r\n     client = get_redis()\r\n     stream = stream_for_queue(queue)\r\n \r\n     try:\r\n         await client.xgroup_create(stream, settings.consumer_group, id=\"0-0\", mkstream=True)\r\n         logger.info(\"Created consumer group\", extra={\"stream\": stream})\r\n     except redis.exceptions.ResponseError as exc:\r\n         # BUSYGROUP means it already exists; ignore.\r\n         if \"BUSYGROUP\" not in str(exc):\r\n             raise\r\n \r\n \r\n async def enqueue_job(\r\n     *,\r\n     job_id: str,\r\n     job_type: str,\r\n     queue: str,\r\n     idempotency_key: str | None,\r\n ) -> str:\r\n     \"\"\"XADD a job reference to the appropriate stream.\"\"\"\r\n \r\n     client = get_redis()\r\n     stream = stream_for_queue(queue)\r\n     fields: Dict[str, Any] = {\r\n         \"job_id\": job_id,\r\n         \"type\": job_type,\r\n         \"queue\": queue,\r\n     }\r\n     if idempotency_key:\r\n         fields[\"idempotency_key\"] = idempotency_key\r\n \r\n     entry_id = await client.xadd(stream, fields)\r\n     JOBS_ENQUEUED_TOTAL.labels(type=job_type, queue=queue).inc()\r\n     return entry_id\r\n \r\n \r\n async def push_dead_letter(payload: Dict[str, Any]) -> str:\r\n     client = get_redis()\r\n     return await client.xadd(DEAD_LETTER_STREAM, payload)\r\n \r\n \r\n async def read_jobs(\r\n     *,\r\n     queue: str,\r\n     consumer_name: str,\r\n     count: int,\r\n     block_ms: int,\r\n ) -> List[BrokerMessage]:\r\n     \"\"\"Read from Redis Streams via XREADGROUP.\"\"\"\r\n \r\n     settings = get_settings()\r\n     client = get_redis()\r\n     stream = stream_for_queue(queue)\r\n \r\n     streams = {stream: \">\"}\r\n     resp: List[Tuple[str, List[Tuple[str, Dict[bytes, bytes]]]]] | None = await client.xreadgroup(\r\n         groupname=settings.consumer_group,\r\n         consumername=consumer_name,\r\n         streams=streams,\r\n         count=count,\r\n         block=block_ms,\r\n     )\r\n     messages: List[BrokerMessage] = []\r\n     if not resp:\r\n         return messages\r\n \r\n     for stream_name, entries in resp:\r\n         for entry_id, raw_fields in entries:\r\n             decoded = {k.decode(): v.decode() for k, v in raw_fields.items()}\r\n             messages.append(BrokerMessage(stream=stream_name, entry_id=entry_id, fields=decoded))\r\n     return messages\r\n \r\n \r\n async def ack_job(queue: str, entry_id: str) -> int:\r\n     \"\"\"Acknowledge processing of a job.\"\"\"\r\n \r\n     settings = get_settings()\r\n     client = get_redis()\r\n     stream = stream_for_queue(queue)\r\n     return int(\r\n         await client.xack(\r\n             stream,\r\n             settings.consumer_group,\r\n             entry_id,\r\n         )\r\n     )\r\n \r\n \r\n async def reclaim_stuck(\r\n     *,\r\n     queue: str,\r\n     consumer_name: str,\r\n     min_idle_ms: int,\r\n     count: int = 10,\r\n ) -> List[BrokerMessage]:\r\n     \"\"\"Reclaim messages that have been idle longer than min_idle_ms using XAUTOCLAIM.\"\"\"\r\n \r\n     settings = get_settings()\r\n     client = get_redis()\r\n     stream = stream_for_queue(queue)\r\n \r\n     start_id = \"0-0\"\r\n     messages: List[BrokerMessage] = []\r\n \r\n     try:\r\n         start_id, claimed = await client.xautoclaim(  # type: ignore[assignment]\r\n             stream,\r\n             settings.consumer_group,\r\n             consumer_name,\r\n             min_idle_ms,\r\n             start_id,\r\n             count=count,\r\n         )\r\n     except redis.ResponseError:\r\n         # If group does not yet exist, nothing to reclaim.\r\n         return messages\r\n \r\n     for entry_id, raw_fields in claimed:\r\n         decoded = {k.decode(): v.decode() for k, v in raw_fields.items()}\r\n         messages.append(BrokerMessage(stream=stream, entry_id=entry_id, fields=decoded))\r\n \r\n     if messages:\r\n         WORKER_RECLAIMS_TOTAL.inc(len(messages))\r\n \r\n     return messages\r\n \r\n \r\n async def update_queue_depth(queue: str) -> None:\r\n     \"\"\"Update the queue depth gauge for a given queue.\"\"\"\r\n \r\n     client = get_redis()\r\n     stream = stream_for_queue(queue)\r\n     length = await client.xlen(stream)\r\n     QUEUE_DEPTH.labels(queue=queue).set(length)\r\n \r\n"
        },
        "2:LEN": "649861ea4e29af5a6b09b7a58f4b8d66d0c03003d70603785024ab8758dc21a0",
        "3:LEN": "REDACTED"
      },
      "3:LEN": [
        {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED"
        },
        {
          "1:LEN": "REDACTED"
        },
        {
          "1:LEN": "."
        }
      ],
      "4:VARINT": 1
    }
  ]
}
```

Access-Control-Allow-Credentials: true
Access-Control-Expose-Headers: Grpc-Status\, Grpc-Message\, Grpc-Status-Details-Bin\, Content-Encoding\, Connect-Content-Encoding\, traceparent\, backend-traceparent\, x-amzn-trace-id\, x-request-id
Content-Type: application/proto
Date: Thu\, 05 Mar 2026 02:47:50 GMT
Vary: Origin

cap: float,\r\n     rng: Callable[[], float] | None = None,\r\n ) -> float:\r\n     \"\"\"Compute exponential backoff with jitter.\r\n \r\n     The formula is:\r\n         delay_no_jitter = min(cap, base * multiplier ** max(attempt - 1, 0))\r\n         jitter = uniform(0, delay_no_jitter)\r\n         delay = jitter\r\n \r\n     Using full jitter keeps retries smoothed over the window.\r\n     \"\"\"\r\n \r\n     if attempt <= 0:\r\n         raise ValueError(\"attempt must be >= 1\")\r\n \r\n     if rng is None:\r\n         rng = random.random\r\n \r\n     delay_no_jitter = min(cap, base * (multiplier ** max(attempt - 1, 0)))\r\n     return delay_no_jitter * rng()\r\n \r\n"}, "2:LEN": "76e8d0c605188530080cf3070eabd0723da5ebe60b6d4ac1daad83941413e6eb", "3:LEN": "REDACTED"}, "3:LEN": [{"1:LEN": "REDACTED"}, {"1:LEN": "REDACTED"}, {"1:LEN": "."}], "4:VARINT": 1}, {"2:LEN": {"1:LEN": {"1:LEN": "REDACTED", "2:LEN": " from __future__ import annotations\r\n \r\n from dataclasses import dataclass\r\n from typing import Any, Dict, List, Tuple\r\n \r\n import redis.asyncio as redis\r\n \r\n from .config import get_settings\r\n from .logging import get_logger\r\n from .metrics import JOBS_ENQUEUED_TOTAL, QUEUE_DEPTH, WORKER_RECLAIMS_TOTAL\r\n \r\n \r\n logger = get_logger(__name__, service=\"broker\")\r\n \r\n _redis_client: redis.Redis | None = None\r\n \r\n \r\n def get_redis() -> redis.Redis:\r\n     global _redis_client\r\n     if _redis_client is None:\r\n         settings = get_settings()\r\n         _redis_client = redis.from_url(settings.redis_url)\r\n     return _redis_client\r\n \r\n \r\n def stream_for_queue(queue: str) -> str:\r\n     return f\"jobs:{queue}\"\r\n \r\n \r\n DEAD_LETTER_STREAM = \"jobs:dlq\"\r\n \r\n \r\n @dataclass\r\n class BrokerMessage:\r\n     stream: str\r\n     entry_id: str\r\n     fields: Dict[str, Any]\r\n \r\n \r\n async def ensure_group(queue: str) -> None:\r\n     \"\"\"Ensure the Redis Stream and consumer group exist.\"\"\"\r\n \r\n     settings = get_settings()\r\n     client = get_redis()\r\n     stream = stream_for_queue(queue)\r\n \r\n     try:\r\n         await client.xgroup_create(stream, settings.consumer_group, id=\"0-0\", mkstream=True)\r\n         logger.info(\"Created consumer group\", extra={\"stream\": stream})\r\n     except redis.exceptions.ResponseError as exc:\r\n         # BUSYGROUP means it already exists; ignore.\r\n         if \"BUSYGROUP\" not in str(exc):\r\n             raise\r\n \r\n \r\n async def enqueue_job(\r\n     *,\r\n     job_id: str,\r\n     job_type: str,\r\n     queue: str,\r\n     idempotency_key: str | None,\r\n ) -> str:\r\n     \"\"\"XADD a job reference to the appropriate stream.\"\"\"\r\n \r\n     client = get_redis()\r\n     stream = stream_for_queue(queue)\r\n     fields: Dict[str, Any] = {\r\n         \"job_id\": job_id,\r\n         \"type\": job_type,\r\n         \"queue\": queue,\r\n     }\r\n     if idempotency_key:\r\n         fields[\"idempotency_key\"] = idempotency_key\r\n \r\n     entry_id = await client.xadd(stream, fields)\r\n     JOBS_ENQUEUED_TOTAL.labels(type=job_type, queue=queue).inc()\r\n     return entry_id\r\n \r\n \r\n async def push_dead_letter(payload: Dict[str, Any]) -> str:\r\n     client = get_redis()\r\n     return await client.xadd(DEAD_LETTER_STREAM, payload)\r\n \r\n \r\n async def read_jobs(\r\n     *,\r\n     queue: str,\r\n     consumer_name: str,\r\n     count: int,\r\n     block_ms: int,\r\n ) -> List[BrokerMessage]:\r\n     \"\"\"Read from Redis Streams via XREADGROUP.\"\"\"\r\n \r\n     settings = get_settings()\r\n     client = get_redis()\r\n     stream = stream_for_queue(queue)\r\n \r\n     streams = {stream: \">\"}\r\n     resp: List[Tuple[str, List[Tuple[str, Dict[bytes, bytes]]]]] | None = await client.xreadgroup(\r\n         groupname=settings.consumer_group,\r\n         consumername=consumer_name,\r\n         streams=streams,\r\n         count=count,\r\n         block=block_ms,\r\n     )\r\n     messages: List[BrokerMessage] = []\r\n     if not resp:\r\n         return messages\r\n \r\n     for stream_name, entries in resp:\r\n         for entry_id, raw_fields in entries:\r\n             decoded = {k.decode(): v.decode() for k, v in raw_fields.items()}\r\n             messages.append(BrokerMessage(stream=stream_name, entry_id=entry_id, fields=decoded))\r\n     return messages\r\n \r\n \r\n async def ack_job(queue: str, entry_id: str) -> int:\r\n     \"\"\"Acknowledge processing of a job.\"\"\"\r\n \r\n     settings = get_settings()\r\n     client = get_redis()\r\n     stream = stream_for_queue(queue)\r\n     return int(\r\n         await client.xack(\r\n             stream,\r\n             settings.consumer_group,\r\n             entry_id,\r\n         )\r\n     )\r\n \r\n \r\n async def reclaim_stuck(\r\n     *,\r\n     queue: str,\r\n     consumer_name: str,\r\n     min_idle_ms: int,\r\n     count: int = 10,\r\n ) -> List[BrokerMessage]:\r\n     \"\"\"Reclaim messages that have been idle longer than min_idle_ms using XAUTOCLAIM.\"\"\"\r\n \r\n     settings = get_settings()\r\n     client = get_redis()\r\n     stream = stream_for_queue(queue)\r\n \r\n     start_id = \"0-0\"\r\n     messages: List[BrokerMessage] = []\r\n \r\n     try:\r\n         start_id, claimed = await client.xautoclaim(  # type: ignore[assignment]\r\n             stream,\r\n             settings.consumer_group,\r\n             consumer_name,\r\n             min_idle_ms,\r\n             start_id,\r\n             count=count,\r\n         )\r\n     except redis.ResponseError:\r\n         # If group does not yet exist, nothing to reclaim.\r\n         return messages\r\n \r\n     for entry_id, raw_fields in claimed:\r\n         decoded = {k.decode(): v.decode() for k, v in raw_fields.items()}\r\n         messages.append(BrokerMessage(stream=stream, entry_id=entry_id, fields=decoded))\r\n \r\n     if messages:\r\n         WORKER_RECLAIMS_TOTAL.inc(len(messages))\r\n \r\n     return messages\r\n \r\n \r\n async def update_queue_depth(queue: str) -> None:\r\n     \"\"\"Update the queue depth gauge for a given queue.\"\"\"\r\n \r\n     client = get_redis()\r\n     stream = stream_for_queue(queue)\r\n     length = await client.xlen(stream)\r\n     QUEUE_DEPTH.labels(queue=queue).set(length)\r\n \r\n"}, "2:LEN": "649861ea4e29af5a6b09b7a58f4b8d66d0c03003d70603785024ab8758dc21a0", "3:LEN": "REDACTED"}, "3:LEN": [{"1:LEN": "REDACTED"}, {"1:LEN":
